nasb.text: Rachel and Leah said to him, “Do we still have any portion or inheritance in our father’s house?

esv.text: Then Rachel and Leah answered and said to him, “Is there any portion or inheritance left to us in our father’s house?

cnv.text: 拉結和利亞回答雅各，說：“在我們父親的家裡，我們還有可得的分和產業嗎？

ccb.text: 拉结和利亚说：“父亲的家产没有我们的份儿，

csbs.text: 瑞秋和莉亚就回应，对他说：“在我们父亲的家里，难道还有属于我们的份和继业吗？
